about.title: About Us
about.missionDesc: To build a foundation of logical thinking and innovation through hands-on robotics and coding experiences.
about.feature1Desc: Structured learning paths from fundamental block programming to advanced algorithms and robotics design.
about.feature2Desc: Guided by experienced instructors passionate about technology and student development.

trainings.title: Active Courses
trainings.course1Desc: Introduction to robot building and visual programming for beginners.
trainings.course2Desc: Advanced software concepts, Python, and algorithmic integration.
trainings.course3Desc: Soldering, PCB design, and custom electronics construction.
